PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?novel ?novelLabel WHERE {
  ?novel wdt:P50 wd:Q5686 .
  ?novel wdt:P31 wd:Q82622 .
  ?novel wdt:P674 ?protagonist .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?protagonist wdt:P106 ?occupation
  }
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?protagonist wdt:P26 ?spouse
  }
  .
  FILTER(BOUND(?occupation) || BOUND(?spouse))
  .
  ?novel rdfs:label ?novelLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?novelLabel) = "en")
  .
}
ORDER BY ?novelLabel
